one_time_description: Robinson Huron Treaty (RHT) past compensation settlement receivable recognized as revenue in fiscal 2024
economic_notes: Dokis First Nation holds 99.5% interest in Migisi Hydro L.P. and 40% interest in Okikendawt Hydro L.P. Also invested in Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth L.P. (0.5915% interest). Migisi Development Corporation is sole-shareholder subsidiary acting as general partner to Migisi L.P.
notes: Massive one-time item: RHT (Robinson Huron Treaty) past compensation settlement of $358,844,313 recognized as receivable and revenue in FY2024, driving accumulated surplus from ~$22.6M to ~$383.8M. Six inactive subsidiaries consolidated (Dokis Forestry Corporation Inc., Migisi Power Corporation, Migisi Power Authority Inc., Migisi Utility Authority Inc., Migisi Tax Authority Inc., Migisi Development Corporation). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Migisi Hydro L.P. (99.5%) and Okikendawt Hydro L.P. (40%). Migisi Hydro L.P. was disposed/contributed to Okikendawt Hydro and Dokis Community Trust during the year ($964,140 charge). Revenue figure used excludes RHT settlement and Migisi LP earnings as those are shown separately below operating line; total revenues per statement of operations = $26,337,182 before deferred contributions end of year adjustment.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
